title: AI Has Finally Become a Money-Making Machine: Alphabet's Second-Quarter Revenue Rises 24% as Gemini Monthly Active Users Reach 9.5 Billion
excerpt: A quarterly report has become solid evidence that AI is moving from a story of burning money to a reality of making money. On July 23, Alphabet CEO Sundar Picha
content_html:
A quarterly report has become solid evidence that AI is moving from a story of burning money to a reality of making money. On July 23, Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai posted the second-quarter results on the social media platform X. The confidence behind his opening statement, "This quarter was amazing, and our AI investments are redefining the possibilities in every part of our business," comes from some impressive numbers.

The most striking aspect is the acceleration of the overall performance. Alphabet's revenue grew by 24% year-over-year in the second quarter, while Google Cloud's growth rate soared to 82%, becoming the strongest engine driving the entire company. From search to YouTube to the Gemini app, Pichai described this growth curve as "completely positive." What supports it is the AI infrastructure investment, which has been repeatedly questioned for being too heavy in recent years.

Signals from the user side are equally eye-catching. The monthly active users of the Gemini app have reached 950 million, approaching the one billion mark. This means a conversational product driven by large models has quickly grown into a global consumer-level entry point in a very short time. More importantly, there's a sharp increase in model usage: Google's model API now processes 22 billion tokens per minute, up from over 16 billion in the previous quarter. In just one quarter, the Flash series models have increased this number by nearly 40%. Pichai called Flash the main workhorse, which also confirms that low-cost, high-throughput models are becoming the default choice in real production environments.

In the enterprise market, Gemini Enterprise has been adopted by 90% of the Fortune 100 companies, and demand for security solutions remains strong. When the top companies integrate Gemini into their workflows, the value of AI for enterprises is no longer just a pilot project demonstration but has already been reflected in procurement and deployment.

content_html_zh:
一份季报已经成为人工智能正在从烧钱的故事走向赚钱的现实的铁证。 7月23日，Alphabet首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊在社交媒体平台X上发布了第二季度业绩。 他的开场白“这个季度非常棒，我们的人工智能投资正在重新定义我们业务各个部分的可能性”，背后的信心来自于一些令人印象深刻的数字。

最引人注目的方面是整体性能的加速。 Alphabet第二季度营收同比增长24%，而谷歌云增速则飙升至82%，成为驱动整个公司最强劲的引擎。 从搜索到 YouTube 再到 Gemini 应用程序，皮查伊将这条增长曲线描述为“完全积极的”。 支撑它的是近年来屡屡被质疑过重的AI基础设施投资。

来自用户端的信号同样引人注目。 Gemini App月活跃用户已达9.5亿，逼近10亿大关。 这意味着一款由大模型驱动的对话式产品在极短的时间内迅速成长为全球消费级的切入点。 更重要的是，模型使用量急剧增加：Google 的模型 API 现在每分钟处理 220 亿个令牌，高于上一季度的超过 160 亿个。 仅仅一个季度，Flash系列机型就将这一数字增加了近40%。 Pichai 将闪存称为主要主力，这也证实了低成本、高吞吐量模型正在成为实际生产环境中的默认选择。

在企业市场，Gemini Enterprise已被90%的财富100强企业采用，安全解决方案的需求依然强劲。 当顶尖企业将Gemini融入到自己的工作流程中时，AI对于企业的价值不再只是试点示范，而是已经体现在采购和部署中。
